text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: The last race left me with much to reflect on.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that insight, I was able to take full
advantage of what little time I had.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But I refuse to go through that experience again.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'll make sure there's no reason for regret
this time. ♪
